name: textarea
description: Auto-growing multi-line text input with label, helper text, and error state.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text rendered above the textarea.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Descriptive text shown below the textarea when there is no error.

props.name: error
props.description: Validation error message; when set the border and label turn red and it replaces helperText.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the textarea is non-editable and rendered with a disabled background.

props.name: minRows
props.description: Minimum number of visible text rows. The textarea starts at this height and grows upward.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Maximum height in pixels. Once reached the textarea becomes internally scrollable.

props.name: accessibilityHint
props.description: Additional accessibility hint. Falls back to the error string when in an error state.
